data.content: Implemented beat-scoped per-agent token tracking. Added persisted token_usage log lines from Codex turn.completed usage in terminal, orchestration, and breakdown flows; parsed and aggregated saved tokenUsageByAgent into beat summaries; rendered saved per-agent counts in beat diagnostics; added logger/extraction/history/render tests. Validation: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build. Branch: foolery-81ad. Commit: bdc3d7fafd42.
